title: Run a safe, reconciled backfill
description: Reprocess a historical range with idempotent tasks, bounded concurrency, and a reconciliation check against the original output.
body: Use when a logic fix requires reprocessing past dates. Do not rerun history at full parallelism on append-mode tasks — it duplicates data and can overload shared resources. Actions: verify each task overwrites its own date partition idempotently, cap backfill concurrency, run the explicit date range, then diff a sample of backfilled output against the original scheduled output. Validation signals include backfilled partitions matching expectations and shared resources staying within capacity during the run. Risk boundary: a backfill that double-writes corrupts downstream totals; if reconciliation shows duplication or drift, halt the backfill and escalate to fix idempotency before continuing.
